name: webserver
short_description: Start and Stop the webserver. With no arguments this gives the state of the webserver (running or stopped), URL, key value, and active connections.
full_help:
webserver

Description: 
Start and Stop the webserver. With no arguments this gives the state of the webserver (running or stopped), URL, key value, and active connections.

Syntax: 
webserver  [-start] [-stop] [-open] [-external] [-browser <arg>] [-port <arg>]
           [-key <arg>] [-quiet] [-verbose]

Usage: 
  Name         Description
  ------------------------
  [-start]     start the webserver if not running
  [-stop]      stop the webserver if running
  [-open]      start if not running and open a browser
  [-external]  allow connections from external hosts. Only valid with 
               start/open
  [-browser]   optional browser to use when opening HTML. Implies 'open'
  [-port]      webserver port. Use 0 to choose an open port. Only valid with 
               'start'
               Default: 0
  [-key]       none, auto, or a string to be used as a security key (website 
               password).
  [-quiet]     Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]   Suspend message limits during command execution

Categories:
